word: G1369 - διχάζω - dicházō - dee-khad'-zo - Set at variance

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διχάζω

- Transliteration: Dichazo

- Phonetic: dee-khad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to cut into two parts, cleave asunder, sever

- Origin: from a derivative of G1364

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From a derivative of G1364; to make apart that is sunder (figuratively alienate): - set at variance.
